title: Menu
description: Displays a hierarchical action list with support for nested items, icons, and decorators. Supports horizontal and vertical orientations with configurable open/close triggers.

sections.title: Use decorators
sections.description: Use ax-prefix and ax-suffix to add elements at the start and end of a menu item.

sections.title: Multi level
sections.description: Menu can have a nested structure.

sections.title: Data-driven items
sections.description: Render items from AXMenuItem[] via the [items] input.

sections.title: Disabled items
sections.description: Show disabled items that neither open nor emit events.

sections.title: Dividers and group headers
sections.description: Use ax-title/ax-divider in projection and group/break in data.

sections.title: RTL behavior
sections.description: Demonstrate submenu arrows and placement in RTL.

sections.title: Scrollable container
sections.description: Scrolling the container closes open submenus.

props.name: nativeElement
props.description: The root DOM element of the component. Inherited from NXComponent.

props.name: isRendered
props.description: Signal indicating if the component has been rendered. Inherited from NXComponent.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of menu items to render recursively.

props.name: hasArrow
props.description: Shows an arrow indicator for items that contain submenus.

events.name: onItemClick
events.description: Emitted when a menu item is clicked.

methods.content:
/**
 * Closes all open menus and submenus for this root menu.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. All open menu overlays are closed and hidden.
 */
close(): void

props.name: nativeElement
props.description: The root DOM element of the component. Inherited from NXComponent.

props.name: isRendered
props.description: Signal indicating if the component has been rendered. Inherited from NXComponent.

props.name: name
props.description: Unique name identifier for the item.

props.name: data
props.description: Arbitrary data associated with the item.

props.name: color
props.description: Color theme applied to the item.

events.name: onClick
events.description: Emitted when the user clicks the item.

methods.content:
/**
 * Opens the submenu of this menu item if it has sub-items and is not disabled.
 *
 * Inherited behavior: Uses the injected service to notify other items to close.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. Triggers submenu opening side-effects.
 */
open(): void

/**
 * Closes the submenu of this menu item if open.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. Triggers submenu closing side-effects.
 */
close(): void
